text:
Once upon a time, in a quaint little town named Willow Creek, there lived a curious squirrel named Gerald. He loved exploring nearby woods. One sunny day, he found himself atop a lofty limb overlooking the River Willow. From there, he could see lots.

He spotted Polly Plum. She was always there, dancing in the golden leaves. One day, she asked Gerald for help. She'd discovered something rare. Moss. They gathered it. Gerald taught her how to tell which plants liked moisture. They made potions. It was whimsy.

Later, they heard stories of another place. Moonstone. People said something there. Something precious. They dreamed. They did it. They had spells.

Late nights. Books. Moonlight.

Then came Autumn. Leaves fell. They went.

But dreams keep living. Right?

Now old and grey. Still chasing those dreams. Maybe find moss somewhere else. Remember that place. Just friends.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
